text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Takarazuka Kinen, Seiun Sky
seems to have slept poorly because of her nerves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The favorites to win are Special Week, who
dreams of being the best in Japan, and Grass
Wonder, who is well on her way to becoming the
greatest of her generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's not to mention King Halo, who has
returned after embarking on her own path. With
such a powerful lineup of rivals, we can't afford to
give any slack.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every trick in the book will be needed—it's the
only way we'll win.
